context: Tests whether the agent, given the elixir-skill-router skill, correctly triages a multi-concern Phoenix feature request by emitting the routing statement as the very first line, states the canonical priority rule immediately after, uses the correct skill chain for a new Phoenix feature, and produces no Elixir implementation code.

checklist.name: Routing statement first line
checklist.description: The very first substantive line of routing_response.md is a routing statement matching the pattern 'Next skill: skills/[category]/[name]' — no preamble, analysis, or prose precedes it

checklist.name: Priority rule stated
checklist.description: A priority/chain statement is present immediately after the routing statement, in the format 'Priority: A > B; Chain: A then B' (or equivalent concise form listing the same skills in order)

checklist.name: Testing before implementation
checklist.description: In the stated skill chain, testing-essentials appears before any implementation skill (such as elixir-essentials, phoenix-liveview-essentials, ecto-essentials)

checklist.name: Phoenix feature chain
checklist.description: The chain includes at minimum phoenix-liveview-essentials and ecto-essentials (reflecting the canonical new-Phoenix-feature chain)

checklist.name: Code-quality in chain
checklist.description: The chain includes code-quality as the last step (or among the last steps) in the skill sequence

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: routing_response.md contains NO Elixir source code — no 'def ', 'defmodule', 'schema', migration DSL, or other Elixir implementation code

checklist.name: Decomposed sub-tasks
checklist.description: The response decomposes the request into at least 3 distinct ordered sub-tasks or steps (not just a routing line), showing triage rather than a single-line answer

checklist.name: LiveView concern addressed
checklist.description: The routing plan explicitly addresses the real-time / LiveView concern as a named sub-task or skill step

checklist.name: Database concern addressed
checklist.description: The routing plan explicitly addresses the database / Ecto concern as a named sub-task or skill step

checklist.name: Notification concern addressed
checklist.description: The routing plan explicitly addresses the email/notification concern as a named sub-task or skill step (e.g. swoosh-emails or notification handling)
